svg.title: OpsMind AI Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Shows three main flows: Admin uploads PDFs, they get processed into a vector database, and employees ask questions to get cited answers.
svg.text: Phase 3 — AI generates a cited answer
Employee asks: "How do I process a refund?"
AI answers: "To process a refund, navigate to the Billing module and click 'Initiate Refund'.
Enter the order ID and reason code, then submit for manager approval."
